word: G2721 - κατεφίστημι - katephístēmi - kat-ef-is'-tay-mee - Make insurrection against

sections.paragraph:
- Original: κατεφίστημι

- Transliteration: Katephistemi

- Phonetic: kat-ef-is'-tay-mee

- Definition:

1. to set up against

- Origin: from G2596 and G2186

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G2596 and G2186; to stand over against that is rush upon (assault): - make insurrection against.
